will_not_join: I will not be able to join.
undecided: I don't know yet if I will be able to join.
please_log_in: Please log in to see the content of this website.
save_reminder: Please note that no changes (editing info / adding or removing a guest) will be saved until you press submit!
guests_disclaimer:
Due to limited venue capacity, we may not be able to accommodate all guests.
Please list any guests you'd like to bring — we'll let you know who can be accommodated.
One guest is guaranteed for those traveling from abroad.
seating_preference_info: If you have seating preferences (for example, if you would like to sit near certain people or away from others), please indicate your preferences in the text field below.
